creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Unless explicitly specified by USE_NEWGCC, ports assume the standard 
system (be it -STABLE or -CURRENT) compiler.  Using any other compiler 
is unsupported.  As and when gcc3 makes it into -CURRENT, there will 
doubtless be many fixes that will need to be applied to the ports tree. 

That hasn't happened yet.
